Flinders Architecture & Conservation

Flinders is an architecture practice and consultancy specialising in prime, Central London property. The firm has special expertise in historic and Listed Buildings.

Flinders Architecture & Conservation is based at 5 Blenheim Street, Mayfair, London, W1S 1LD. Telephone +44 (0)7979 821 770. Email info@flindersarchitecture.com.

Flinders Architecture & Conservation was founded by Jerome Flinders, Founder & Director of the practice. Jerome Flinders is an architect specialising in prime, Central London property and the conservation of historic and Listed Buildings.

Flinders is an architecture practice and consultancy specialising in prime, Central London property. The firm has special expertise in historic and Listed Buildings.
